input.background: Calculate the sample mean for the R&D expenditure percentages of the 50 companies given in Table 2.2.
input.question: What is the formula to calculate the sample mean for the R&D expenditure percentages of the 50 companies?

output.answer: The mean R&D percentage for the 50 companies is denoted $$ \bar{x}=\frac{\sum_{i=1}^{50} x_i}{50} $$.

meta_info.caption: Finding the Mean on a Printout-R\\\\&D Expenditures
meta_info.chapter: Methods for Describing Sets of Data
